raw_consumer_statement:
Dear CFPB, I am filing a complaint against American Express for failing to properly handle my dispute regarding a charge of {$890.00} from XXXX XXXX. 

On XX/XX/year>, I purchased airfare through XXXX with my American Express card ( ending in XXXX ). Within hours, I discovered the wrong dates were booked and attempted to cancel through XXXX and XXXX XXXX. Both refused to assist despite DOTs XXXX cancellation rule. 

I then filed a dispute with American Express, providing proof that I acted within hours of booking. Amex initially placed the funds on hold but later sided with XXXX XXXX, reapplying the charge to my account. 

Frontiers documentation falsely categorized me as a no-show, when in reality, I requested cancellation well within the permitted timeframe. American Express failed to protect me as a cardholder and ignored the clear consumer protection laws in place.

Resolution requested : American Express should reverse the {$890.00} charge.

Amex should improve its dispute resolution process to properly recognize DOTs XXXX refund regulation in airline disputes. 

Attachments included : XXXX booking confirmation. 

Amex dispute letters ( initial acceptance and later denial ). 

Frontiers no-show documentation. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX.
